flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Concordia University-Saint Paul fell 25% between 2021 and 2024 (43.2% → 32.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Concordia University-Saint Paul fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (52.8% → 45.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Concordia University-Saint Paul fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Concordia University-Saint Paul fell 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($20.8k → $17.8k).
